rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Gamarue Rundll32.exe Long Commandlines

rules.rule_text:
title: Gamarue Rundll32.exe Long Commandlines
id: 66fa7a57-1c53-42e1-9e5c-e9a1f5e62784
status: experimental
description: "Fortunately for defenders, Gamarue is detectable with endpoint telemetry.\
  \ The majority \nof Gamarue activity we see involves rundll32.exe executing with\
  \ unusual command lines \nthat include long filenames with repeating characters\
  \ and random function names. Part \nof the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/gamarue/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1027
- attack.t1027.010
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|re: .*\S{10,70}\.\S{10,70},\w{16}
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
